# Metechi
> Metechi builds practical web and mobile applications including CoachPad, Infinite Flux, SwiftQuote, and Verve.

Canonical: https://www.metechi.dev/
Contact: info@metechi.dev
Last updated: 2026-04-29

## Core Pages
- [Metechi - Developer Portfolio](https://www.metechi.dev/) - Product portfolio, support links, and public Metechi overview.
- [CoachPad - Tactical Board App](https://www.metechi.dev/coachpad.html) - Tactical board app for coaches to create, animate, and share team tactics.
- [Infinite Flux - Reflex Runner Game](https://www.metechi.dev/infinite-flux.html) - Reflex runner game focused on lane switching, timing, focus energy, streaks, and upgrades.
- [SwiftQuote - Quotes & Invoices Made Easy](https://www.metechi.dev/swiftquote.html) - Quote and invoice tool for freelancers and small businesses.
- [Verve - Elite Dating & Premium Connections](https://www.metechi.dev/verve.html) - Premium dating and networking app focused on privacy, compatibility, and meaningful connections.

## Product Summary
- CoachPad: sports coaching workflow, tactic animation, formation planning, and team communication.
- Infinite Flux: mobile arcade gameplay with lane switching, shards, streaks, focus energy, and upgrades.
- SwiftQuote: quotes, invoices, PDF sharing, customer management, product catalogs, and income tracking.
- Verve: privacy-focused dating and premium social networking with compatibility-driven matching.
